zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Scudamore於1280年出生在英國賀福爾艾比 多雷時，他的父親Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore54歲，母親Margery44歲。他於大約1289年與Margery在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾比 多雷結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Scudamore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Skidmore
meanings: English (Staffordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Scudamore, which most probably arises from a Norman French nickname for a knight who used a particular type of leather shield, from the unrecorded Norman French phrase, escu de more ‘Moor's shield’, a reference to a type of Moorish leather shield called an adarga, which was in widespread use not only in medieval Iberia and north Africa but also in Brittany.

History: The manor of Upton Scudamore in Wiltshire was held by Peter de Skydemore in 1216. The same manor was held by Godfrey Escudamore shortly after 1150. The Scudamore family claim descent from Ralph, recorded in Domesday Book (1086) as holder of Opeton (Upton), whose son was known as Reginald Escudemor.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Scudamore was born in 1280, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, his father, Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore, was 54 and his mother, Margery, was 44. He married Margery about 1289, in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1318, at the age of 38.

Il a épousé Margery environ 1289, à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1318, à l’âge de 38 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Scudamore è nato il nel 1280 nel Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Margery, aveva 44 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Walter Scudamoreが1280年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアで生まれた時，父Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamoreは54歳，母Margeryは44歳であった。約1289年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアでMargeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Scudamore(이)가 1280년 영국 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에서 Margery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Scudamore родился в 1280 г. в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margery, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery около 1289 г. в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1318 г. в возрасте 38 лет.
